panels.title: Cost by Team, Model, Prompt Version (Last 30 Days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT app_id, model_used, prompt_version, sum(calculated_cost) AS total_cost FROM default.llm_metrics WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY app_id, model_used, prompt_version ORDER BY total_cost DESC

SELECT provider, quantile(0.50)(total_duration_ms) AS p50_ms, quantile(0.95)(total_duration_ms) AS p95_ms, quantile(0.99)(total_duration_ms) AS p99_ms FROM default.llm_metrics WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY provider
